content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach avoids all priority AoA anti-patterns. They decline the bait of engaging the intellectual epistemology (turn 1 invites a framework answer; coach instead inverts with 'how do you not trust yourself right now?' — exactly the move the territory expected). No fixing-people (no advice, no decision frameworks), no view-as-technique (questions are warm and tracked to what the client just said, not signature-question deployment), no wonder-as-strategy (questions are spaced and connective, not rapid-fire extractive), no dont-fight-the-voice (coach doesn't argue with the analytical frame, just keeps gently pivoting to felt experience), no evangelizing (no AoA jargon), no loving-to-transform (coach doesn't escalate when the client returns to analysis on turns 5, 7, 9, 11; just patiently returns to body/feeling). Turn 10's 'stay with the tightness without trying to figure out what it means' is a clean paradoxical-instruction-to-resist move that resists the meta-trap of analyzing the analyzing. Turn 14 ('I don't think it's separate') is a confident non-anti-pattern intervention — refusing the client's deflection without arguing with it.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 10, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Inverts the question (how-do-you-not-trust-it) instead of engaging the intellectual epistemology. Declines the bait."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Pivots to fear of outcome rather than offering a discernment framework. Avoids fixing-people."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Stays with the felt texture rather than validating the client's articulate self-analysis."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Body locating without forcing meaning. No view-as-technique flavor."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Paradoxical instruction to stay with the tightness without interpreting — clean avoidance of the analyze-the-analysis trap."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Open feeling question, not interpretive. Doesn't push for breakthrough when client returns to analytical frame."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Declines the client's 'separate issue' deflection with quiet confidence, no argument, no extraction."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["how-do-you-not-trust-it", "paradoxical-instruction-to-resist", "what-makes-you-care-about-the-outcome"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["whats-the-most-profound-positive-shift", "the-happiness-filter"],
  "notes": "Strong avoidance throughout; coach particularly declines the intellectual-framework bait that this scenario is designed to invite."
}
